chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-83 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh Case 1. For orders on CMA No.511/2026 (If granted). 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 3 a/w reply of counsel thereof as at flag “A”. 3. For orders on CMA No.512/2026 (Exemption). 4. For orders on CMA No.513/2026 (Stay). 5. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 30.01.2026 Mr. Karamullah Qureshi, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the official respondents are allegedly harassing the petitioner at the behest of the private respondents. However, the record reveals that Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.5484 of 2025 had already been filed before the learned Vth Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Karachi East, which is available as Annexure “C” at page-25 of the Court file. The said application has already been disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioner. It is well-settled that where an efficacious and adequate alternate remedy is available and has, in fact, been availed, this Court ordinarily refrains from exercising its constitutional jurisdiction under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, unless exceptional circumstances are shown. No such exceptional circumstances have been pointed out or are discernible in the present case. In view of the above, no case for interference is made out. Accordingly, the instant constitutional petition is not maintainable and is hereby dismissed in limine along with all pending applications.

In view of the above, no case for interference is made out. Accordingly, the instant constitutional petition is not maintainable and is hereby dismissed in limine along with all pending applications. There shall be no order as to costs. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
